finding_summary: Requested/applied/observed terminology previously risked collapsing output command semantics.
resolution: Execution contract r1, invariant registry r1, and worked examples now make the distinction mandatory.

finding_summary: Profile/workspace restore previously risked being read as machine-state restore.
resolution: Restore anti-conflation is now in the execution contract, invariants, and implementation-entry docs.

finding_summary: Graph live/review/history/live-trace language previously depended too much on narrative context.
resolution: Graph mode distinctions are now first-slice requirements with explicit invariants and worked-example coverage.

finding_summary: Implementation readiness language previously overhung blocked actuation scope.
resolution: Sprint 2 split structural command-state readiness from physical actuation and documented the boundary explicitly.
